# Pages — Codex Scoped Guidance

- Pages are route-level components under `src/pages/`
- Use React Router; route-level code splitting with `React.lazy`
- Pages orchestrate via hooks, never call generated services directly
- Every page gets at least a render test
- Follow Fluent UI v9 layout patterns

Full details: `.github/instructions/03-components.instructions.md`
